structured.name: Replace DisplayMessage
structured.objective: Enable a CSO to replace DisplayMessages, already configured on a Charging Station.
structured.description:
This use case describes how a CSO can replace a DisplayMessage that is previously configured in
a Charging Station. Replace the message content, but also all the given parameters with the new
one.
scenario: 1. The CSO asks the CSMS to replace an existing DisplayMessage.

2. The CSMS sends a SetDisplayMessageRequest message to the Charging Station with the a
DisplayMessage with the same ID as already configured in the Charging Station.

3. The Charging Station accepts the request by sending a SetDisplayMessageResponse message
to the CSMS.

4. The Charging Station shows the updated/replaced message on the display at the configured
moment.
structured.prerequisites: There is a message with the same id configured in the Charging Station
structured.postconditions: The DisplayMessage is replaced by the one provided with the same ID.

requirements.precondition:
When a Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest AND there is a
message configured in the Charging Station
with the same id
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL replace the existing message with
the new message (including all the new parameters) AND
respond with a SetDisplayMessageResponse message with
status: Accepted for this message.

chunks.content:
# O06 - Replace DisplayMessage

**Objective:** Enable a CSO to replace DisplayMessages, already configured on a Charging Station.

**Description:** This use case describes how a CSO can replace a DisplayMessage that is previously configured in
a Charging Station. Replace the message content, but also all the given parameters with the new
one.

**Actors:** CSO, CSMS, Charging Station

**Scenario:**
1. The CSO asks the CSMS to replace an existing DisplayMessage.
2. The CSMS sends a SetDisplayMessageRequest message to the Charging Station with the a
DisplayMessage with the same ID as already configured in the Charging Station.
3. The Charging Station accepts the request by sending a SetDisplayMessageResponse message
to the CSMS.
4. The Charging Station shows the updated/replaced message on the display at the configured
moment.

**Prerequisites:** There is a message with the same id configured in the Charging Station

**Postconditions:** The DisplayMessage is replaced by the one provided with the same ID.

# O06 - Requirements

**O06.FR.01**
Precondition: When a Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest AND there is a
message configured in the Charging Station
with the same id
The Charging Station SHALL replace the existing message with
the new message (including all the new parameters) AND
respond with a SetDisplayMessageResponse message with
status: Accepted for this message.
